top3.sql:
SELECT m.label
FROM molecule m
JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'double'
GROUP BY m.molecule_id, m.label
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT m.label
FROM molecule m
JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'double'
GROUP BY m.molecule_id, m.label
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT m.label
FROM molecule m
JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'double'
  AND m.label IN (
    SELECT label
    FROM molecule
    WHERE label LIKE '%carcinogen%' OR label LIKE '%carcinogenic%'
  )
GROUP BY m.molecule_id, m.label
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT m.label
FROM molecule m
JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'double'
GROUP BY m.molecule_id, m.label
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT m.label
FROM molecule m
JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'double'
  AND m.label IN (
    SELECT label
    FROM molecule
    WHERE label LIKE '%carcinogen%' OR label LIKE '%carcinogenic%'
  )
GROUP BY m.molecule_id, m.label
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1;

final.sql:
SELECT m.label
FROM molecule m
JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'double'
GROUP BY m.molecule_id, m.label
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1;
